title: U.S. and Iran Offer Conflicting Accounts of Nuclear Discussions
summary_full: President Trump said Iran had agreed to the “highest level” inspections, hours after an Iranian official said there were “no detailed discussions on the nuclear issue,” as the two sides continued to present different narratives of their latest talks.
